name: Carrots Divine
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Boil the carrots until they are soft enough to mash.
3. Drain and mash the carrots, then sprinkle with lemon juice.
4. Cream together butter, Crisco, brown sugar, and egg in a bowl.
5. Add flour, baking powder, and baking soda; mix well.
6. Mix in the mashed carrots, blending thoroughly.
7. Pour into a greased mold (2-quart) or an 8½" x 4½" loaf pan.
8. Bake for 50-60 minutes.
9. Unmold and serve when warm. This dish can be frozen and reheated in foil.
10. Serves 6. Each serving contains 1 vegetable exchange, 1 starch/bread exchange, and 1 fat exchange.
